home.letUsKnow: Let us know what we can do for you!
home.branding_desc: Creating a strategy adapted to you
home.design_desc: Building a website to suit your need
home.socialMedia_desc: Helping you to grow your traffic
home.jumbotronTitle: Welcome to the best digital creative studio in the world
home.jumbotronText: Based on no real scientific studies, but we have high hopes.
home.aboutUsText: We are a humble, yet very ambitious digital creative studio based in Montreal. Why do we do this? Simple: there are too many studios and freelancers out there that take your money and don't do a good job (trust us, we've seen things...). We want to fix that! We can guarantee that you will not find tenacity like ours in any other studio.

contact.takeAFewSeconds: Please take a few seconds to tell us more about you and your project!
contact.services: What services are you interested in?
contact.selectMany: Select as many as you want.

web-presence.label: Web Presence
web-presence.label_desc: Build or refresh your website with a solid brand foundation.
web-presence.has-website: Do you already have a website?
web-presence.needs-redesign: Does it need a full redesign?
web-presence.has-brand-identity: Do you have an existing brand identity (logo, colors, typography)?
web-presence.needs-cms: Do you need to manage your content yourself without a developer?

web-application.label: Web Application
web-application.label_desc: Design and develop custom platforms, dashboards, or SaaS products.
web-application.is-app-project: Are you looking to build something beyond a standard website — like a platform, dashboard, or SaaS product?
web-application.has-existing-app: Do you have an existing application you want to extend?
web-application.needs-api-integrations: Does it require new third-party API integrations (payments, CRMs, external services)?
web-application.needs-auth: Will users need to log in and have their own accounts?
web-application.needs-roles: Do you need multiple user roles or permission levels?
web-application.needs-database: Does the project require storing and querying custom data?

ongoing-support.label: Ongoing Support
ongoing-support.label_desc: Keep your site healthy, up to date, and growing with reliable ongoing care.
ongoing-support.has-live-site: Do you have a live website that needs ongoing care?
ongoing-support.needs-content-updates: Do you need regular content or text updates made for you?
ongoing-support.needs-hosting-managed: Do you want hosting and server infrastructure fully managed for you?
ongoing-support.needs-monitoring: Do you need proactive performance and security monitoring?
ongoing-support.needs-seo: Do you need technical SEO work (site structure, speed, schema markup)?
ongoing-support.needs-social-setup: Do you need your social media profiles set up and aligned with your brand?

form.title: Almost done!
form.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself and we'll get back to you.
